message:
feat(fwc): add mesh/registry admin introspection and mutation types

Add RegistryCatalogSource, PlacementStrategy, AdminMutationOutcome,
MeshNodeState, MeshNodeSummary, RegistryEntrySummary, AdminIntrospection,
and ADMIN_COMMANDS for canonical host-backed mesh/registry administration.

These types ensure fwc can reason about node placement, catalog provenance,
package sources, and administrative mutations through the host control plane
with explicit authoritative/stale distinction and receipt-based outcomes.

31 new tests covering source classification, placement strategies, mutation
outcomes, node state, serialization roundtrips, and admin command vocabulary.

Bead: 1g7z0.29.2.4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
